subject: How to set up Slack integration?
message: Hi, I recently upgraded to the Professional plan and I'd like to connect our Slack workspace to TaskFlow Pro. Can you walk me through the setup? Thanks!
Hey, my board is not loading. Just shows a blank screen. Help?

subject: SSO Configuration Error
message: We're trying to set up SAML SSO for our organization but keep getting an 'Invalid Certificate' error. Our IT team has verified the certificate is valid. This is blocking our rollout to 500 users.

subject: Request for refund
message: I was charged $190 for this month but I downgraded to Starter last week. I'd like a refund for the difference. This is very frustrating.
Can I add more than 5 people on the free plan?

subject: GDPR Data Deletion Request
message: Under GDPR Article 17, I am requesting the deletion of all personal data associated with our former employee john.doe@bigcorp.com from your systems. Please confirm when this has been completed.

subject: How to import from Trello?
message: We just migrated from Trello and want to bring over our boards. Is there an import tool? How does it work?
Your API keeps returning 429 errors. We're only making like 50 requests per minute. This is breaking our CI pipeline!

subject: Love the new calendar view!
message: Just wanted to say the new calendar view is amazing! It's exactly what our team needed. Great work! One small suggestion — could you add color coding by project?

subject: Can't create more than 3 boards
message: I'm trying to create a 4th board but it says I've reached my limit. The pricing page says Free includes 'basic boards' — how many can I create?

subject: Urgent - All our tasks disappeared!
message: We logged in this morning and ALL of our tasks in the Q1 Campaign board are gone. We had over 200 tasks. This is a disaster — we have a client deadline tomorrow. PLEASE HELP IMMEDIATELY.
How do I add a due date to a task?

subject: Do you offer nonprofit discounts?
message: Hello, we are a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. We love TaskFlow Pro but can't afford the Starter plan for our team of 15. Do you offer any discounts or special plans for nonprofits?

subject: Automation not triggering
message: I set up an automation to move tasks to Done when all subtasks are completed, but it's not working. I've checked the rule and it looks correct. Can you help troubleshoot?

This is the third time I'm asking about the same issue. Your Gantt view freezes every time I open a project with more than 100 tasks. Nobody has fixed this and I'm seriously considering switching to Monday.com

subject: DPA Request
message: We need to sign a Data Processing Agreement before we can fully onboard our team. Can you provide your standard DPA? We also need to know where data is stored and what sub-processors you use.

subject: Using TaskFlow Pro for a school project
message: Hi! I'm a college student using TaskFlow Pro for a group project. Can guests edit tasks or only view them? Also, is there a student discount?
can u tell me how to export my tasks to csv?

subject: API OAuth2 token expiring too quickly
message: Our OAuth2 access tokens seem to expire after 1 hour, but your documentation doesn't mention the token lifetime. Is there a way to get longer-lived tokens? We're building a custom dashboard that polls your API.

subject: Feature request: Time zone support
message: Our team is spread across 4 time zones. Due dates show in the workspace owner's time zone only. Can you add per-user time zone settings? This causes confusion about deadlines.

subject: Is TaskFlow Pro HIPAA compliant?
message: We're a healthcare organization evaluating TaskFlow Pro. Before we can proceed, we need confirmation of HIPAA compliance and a BAA (Business Associate Agreement). Can you provide documentation?
just upgraded to pro! how do i turn on time tracking?

subject: Accidentally deleted a project
message: I accidentally deleted our main project board. Is there any way to recover it? It had months of work on it. Please tell me there's a way to get it back.

subject: Audit log access
message: We need audit logs for compliance reasons but I can't find them in my Professional plan. Are they only available on Enterprise? If so, what would the upgrade cost for 30 users?
Hi! What's the difference between Starter and Professional? Trying to decide which one to get for my team of 10

subject: Mobile app crashing on Android
message: The Android app crashes every time I try to open a task with attachments. I'm using a Samsung Galaxy S23 with Android 14. I've already tried reinstalling. This started about a week ago.

subject: GitHub integration not syncing PR status
message: I linked a GitHub repo to our project but when PRs are merged, the linked tasks don't automatically update to Done. I followed the setup guide exactly. Any ideas?
I think someone hacked our account. There are tasks and boards I didn't create and our admin password was changed.

subject: Notification settings
message: I'm getting way too many email notifications from TaskFlow Pro. How can I customize which notifications I receive? I only want to be notified when someone @mentions me or when a task I own is due.

subject: Storage limit reached
message: I've hit the 1 GB storage limit on the Free plan. If I upgrade to Starter, will all my existing files carry over? And can I go back to Free later without losing them?
Is there a dark mode? My eyes are killing me 😅

subject: Zapier integration setup help
message: I'm trying to connect TaskFlow Pro to our CRM through Zapier but I can't find TaskFlow Pro in the Zapier app directory. Has the integration been removed? The website says it's supported for Professional plans.

subject: Custom field types
message: We need to add a 'Revenue Impact' custom field (currency type) to our tasks. I see I can add text and number custom fields, but is there a currency or formula field type available?
I want to cancel my subscription. This tool doesn't work for us.

subject: Guest user limitations
message: We invited external contractors as guests to our workspace. They can view tasks but can't leave comments. Is this expected? We need them to be able to comment on tasks assigned to them.

subject: Webhook support
message: Does TaskFlow Pro support outgoing webhooks? I want to trigger a custom script whenever a task status changes. I don't see webhook configuration in the API docs.
Hey quick question - can I duplicate a board with all its tasks?

subject: Partnership Inquiry
message: We're a Nordic tech consultancy and would like to explore becoming a TaskFlow Pro reseller/implementation partner for the Scandinavian market. Who should we speak with about this?

subject: Two-factor authentication issue
message: I enabled 2FA but lost my phone. Now I can't log in. I don't have backup codes either. How can I recover my account?

subject: Annual billing vs monthly
message: We're currently on monthly Enterprise billing. If we switch to annual, what's the discount? Also, can we get an invoice in advance for procurement approval?

subject: FedRAMP certification
message: Does TaskFlow Pro have FedRAMP authorization? We're a government agency and can only use FedRAMP-authorized SaaS products. We're evaluating TaskFlow Pro, Asana, and Monday.com.
Hi there! Just wanted to say thanks for the quick help last time 😊 Everything's working great now!

subject: Follow-up: Board still not loading
message: Hi, I contacted you on WhatsApp yesterday about my board not loading. The issue is still happening. I've tried Chrome and Firefox, cleared cache, even tried on my phone. Nothing works. I need this fixed ASAP — my team is blocked.

subject: Bulk task creation via CSV
message: Is there a way to create multiple tasks at once by uploading a CSV file? We have 200+ tasks to add from a spreadsheet and doing it one by one is not feasible.
your app is absolute garbage. nothing works right. i want my money back NOW or i'm leaving a 1-star review everywhere

subject: How to create subtasks?
message: Hello! I'm new to TaskFlow Pro and loving it so far. Quick question — how do I create subtasks within a task? I've been looking for the option but can't find it.

subject: Recurring tasks not creating copies
message: I set up weekly recurring tasks but when I complete the original, no new task is created. I've set it to repeat every Monday. The repeat icon is showing on the task. Am I missing something?
Hi can I connect Google Drive to TaskFlow?

subject: Workspace transfer
message: I'm leaving the company and need to transfer workspace ownership to my colleague sarah@architecture.firm. How do I do this? I want to make sure nothing is lost in the process.

subject: Gantt view performance - third time contacting
message: This is now the FOURTH time I've contacted support about Gantt view freezing. I've contacted via WhatsApp and now web form. Nobody seems to care. I've been a paying customer for 2 years and this is how you treat us? We're moving to Monday.com next week unless this is resolved.
asdfghjkl

subject: Re: Re: Re: Invoice discrepancy
message: I've been going back and forth about this for three weeks now. My invoice shows 25 users but we only have 18 active users. I keep getting told someone will look into it but nothing happens. I'm seriously considering legal action if this isn't resolved this week.

subject: Can I use TaskFlow Pro offline?
message: I often work in locations without internet (outdoor photo shoots). Is there an offline mode? If not, is it on the roadmap?
Can you tell me what your privacy policy says about sharing data with third parties? We handle sensitive construction blueprints.
